name: Creation of Suspicious Executable Files
notes:
This rule detects creation of suspicious executable files.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Suspicious Executable File Creation
SIGMA Description: Detect creation of suspicious executable file name. Some strings look for suspicious file extensions, others look for filenames that exploit unquoted service paths.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification

when the event matches ( LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.bat.exe' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.sys.exe' ) OR ( LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%recycle.bin.exe') OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%documents and settings.exe') OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%msocache.exe') OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%recovery.exe') OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%perflogs.exe') ) AQL filter query

when the event matches ( "Filename" ilike '%.vbs%' AND ("Image Path"='C:\Program Files\Microsoft Monitoring Agent\Agent\MonitoringHost.exe') or ("Image Path"='C:\Program Files\Microsoft System Center 2016\Operations Manager\Server\MonitoringHost.exe') ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Creation of Suspicious Executable Files on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Created, System.Successful File Modification

AND NOT when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.bat.exe' 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE '%.sys.exe' ) OR  ( 	LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%recycle.bin.exe') 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%documents and settings.exe') 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%msocache.exe') 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%recovery.exe') 	OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE ('%perflogs.exe') ) AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches ( "Filename" ilike '%.vbs%' AND ("Image Path"='C:\Program Files\Microsoft Monitoring Agent\Agent\MonitoringHost.exe') or ("Image Path"='C:\Program Files\Microsoft System Center 2016\Operations Manager\Server\MonitoringHost.exe') ) AQL filter query
